name: current-2026-event-type-residual
description: Exact 2026 current-season test of no-future, season-scoped event-type residual correction after full event metadata coverage.
modelNames: No-Future EPA-MC Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00
No-Future Event-Shift Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8
No-Future Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 C=12 D=6
No-Future Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 C=20 D=10
No-Future Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050
No-Future Event-Type-Residual Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 T=0.05 M=40

No-Future Event-Type-Residual Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 T=0.15 M=60
notes: This branch tests whether event type metadata can safely transfer score bias between prior events of the same type within a season.
The residual memory is season-scoped and only updated after a row's result is observed, so it remains no-future in walk-forward replay.
